items.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
items.summary: Deaths are reported in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit Hezbollah targets after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.

items.title: Meloni tells Trump to 'focus on your own popularity' as row between leaders escalates
items.summary: The US president earlier questioned Meloni's popularity after suggesting she "begged" for a photo at G7 summit

items.title: Bolivian president declares state of emergency
items.summary: The move comes after weeks of anti-government protests that have caused a shortage of basic goods in Bolivia.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 日本簽證費用漲5倍 中國網友怒喊：只制裁「豬肝紅」
items.summary: 日本政府19日宣布7月起簽證費用調漲5倍，引發許多中國網友在社群平台上抱怨「只制裁我們豬肝紅護照」。但也有中國民眾認為影響不大，日幣匯率下降已大幅降低赴日旅遊成本。  據日本共同社報導，...…

items.title: 中國統戰「次外交網絡」遍及全球 澳專家籲在台灣建資料庫反制
items.summary: 澳洲網路及國安專家韋德指出，中國已在全球建立龐大「次外交網絡」，為此，國際社會需要建立「全球公共資料庫」，讓民主社會掌握中國對外擴大政治影響力的做法，並擬定反制策略。他相信，建立相關資料庫的...…

items.title: 西班牙法院禁止總理夫人出境 諭令為貪污指控受審
items.summary: 根據今天公布的法院判令，西班牙法院諭令總理桑傑士夫人葛梅茲為貪污指控出庭受審，並且禁止她離境。  法新社報導，根據裁定書，法官卡羅斯（Juan Carlos Peinado）諭令葛梅茲（...…
